ops.notes: Input-dependent selective SSM scan — the defining Mamba primitive.
Time-invariant SSM; no selectivity, so S4/S5 family rather than Mamba.
Short causal depthwise conv local-mixing lane; shared across SSM blocks.
Elementwise forget-style gate on a linear-recurrence output.
WKV exponentially-weighted KV accumulation with receptance gate.
Token-shift + SiLU-gated channel mixing sublayer of RWKV-4.
elu+1 kernel feature map; O(N) cumulative-sum attention. Foundational.
Data-dependent gate on the linear-attention KV state. (Disabled 2026-05-23: anti-causal leak.)
Delta-rule recurrence with a multiplicative forget gate (DeltaNet 2406.06484 base).
Low-rank joint KV compression with decoupled RoPE.
KV down-projection bottleneck (first half of MLA); also Perceiver/Linformer-adjacent.
Implicit long convolution with data-controlled gating.
Weight-tied recurrent block with per-token depth routing. Op may predate the July-2025 paper (parallel invention).
Truncated fixed-point iteration of a weight-tied map.
Shared MLP across the token dimension; multi-head blend of attention + mixer.
Stable data-dependent cumulative product along sequence.
Cumulative KV-state sum; the O(N) recurrence shared across the family.
Scaled dot-product softmax attention.
Fixed-width local window attention.
Causal sliding-window mask (Mistral 7B).
Strided/dilated factorized attention pattern.
Attention over graph neighborhoods with learned weights.
Subtracts two softmax maps to cancel attention noise.
Rotary relative position encoding.
Lower-triangular autoregressive mask; integral Transformer component.
Routes tokens to attention paths by estimated difficulty; MoD-adjacent.
Coarse-to-fine gated attention; no single published precedent.
Head/projection grouping for KV sharing.
Swish-gated linear-unit FFN (LLaMA/PaLM).
Fused linear+GELU FFN; engineering fusion of the standard FFN.
Top-k gated routing over FFN experts.
Top-2 expert routing special case.
Heterogeneous (variable-capacity) experts.
Fully-differentiable ReLU routing instead of softmax+topk.
Fine-grained + shared expert segmentation with bottleneck.
Top-k over N experts; generalized original MoE gate.
Compresses tokens before expert dispatch; bottleneck-before-dispatch framing not precisely named in literature.
Top-k expert selection gate.
Scatter/gather token dispatch mechanics.
Routes over whole sub-architectures rather than FFN experts; compositional extension, no exact prior name.
Per-token FLOP-budget layer-skip router.
Variable per-token recursion count over a shared block.
Per-token recursion-depth router.
Depth/route-score-weighted projection; no dedicated paper for this exact mechanic.
Confidence-based early exit.
Per-token confidence exit gate.
Draft/verify blend; the soft blend (vs accept/reject) is a novel twist.
Draft-then-verify generation.
Merge similar adjacent tokens.
Bipartite-matching token merging.
2:4 structured sparse matmul (Ampere sparse tensor cores).
Generalized N:M structured sparsity.
Block-structured weight sparsity.
Weights in {-1,0,+1} (1.58-bit).
Straight-through estimator through sign for quantization.
Kronecker-factored weight matrix W=A⊗B.
Low-rank weight factorization.
Subspace-codebook quantized embeddings.
Token embedding table lookup; integral Transformer component.
Learned frequency-domain token filter.
Chebyshev-polynomial spectral mixing.
Learned integral kernel over positions (position-based, not Fourier).
Finite Fourier-feature basis expansion.
Cl(3,0) geometric product as a neural layer (also Ruhe 2302.06594).
Attention via geometric product; ours uses Cl(3,0) vs GATr's projective GA.
Grade-wise linear mixing of multivectors.
Grade projection from a multivector.
Rotor sandwich product for equivariant rotation.
Tangent→Poincaré-ball exponential map.
Poincaré-ball→tangent logarithmic map.
Möbius linear layer.
Geodesic distance as attention score.
Tangent-space nonlinearity.
Möbius addition in the Poincaré ball.
Manifold-aware normalization.
Leaky integrate-and-fire neuron + surrogate gradient.
Continuous↔spike rate coding with STE.
Adaptive threshold sparsity gate.
STDP-inspired temporal-decay attention; ours predates and is simpler than the 2025 full-STDP transformer.
Continuous Hopfield retrieval update (= attention).
(min,+) / (max,+) semiring matmul = shortest-path.
Tropical addition (smooth-min); novel as a residual operator.
Parallel invention — their projective lift vs our smooth-min QKV; their paper postdates the codebase.
No published tropical-semiring gate for transformers.
No published trainable tropical MoE router.
Causal min-centering normalization; no precedent.
Softmin relaxation as tropical softmax; no published standalone op.
Tropical-argmax routing; only theoretical treatment exists.
p-adic-style multi-scale expansion as a trainable layer; no NN precedent. (URL placeholder — math background only.)
Valuation-conditioned gate; no NN precedent.
Multi-resolution p-adic residual; no NN precedent.
Ultrametric-distance attention; no published transformer uses this.

templates.notes: Reference Mamba block: conv1d → selective scan → gated proj.
RWKV with extra normalization; project variant.
Project-novel combination of MLA KV-compression with RWKV time-mixing.
Latent attention interleaved with SSM; project combination.
Local attention + gated linear recurrence (Griffin pattern).
Per-token recursion depth over a shared attn-SSM stack.
Diff attention + conv; conv not in original.
Full MoR block. (Op may predate July-2025 paper.)
Token merge + conv; conv not in ToMe.

templates.citation: Jégou et al. 2011 / Shazeer et al. 2017
templates.notes: No paper pairs PQ embeddings with MoE routing in this form.
Latent attention + sparse FFN (top template by usage).
Conv-residual + retrieval; no single published precedent.
Latent attention + retrieval; no single published precedent.
Block scaffold around tropical matmul; novel.

latent_attention_compressor.notes: Largest mixer family in runs.db: low-rank KV-compression attention (MLA/Linformer lineage).

gated_progressive_attention.notes: Progressive gated attention; no single precedent.

gated_linear_attention.notes: Gated linear attention family (op now disabled).

mixture_of_recursions.notes: MoR recursion family (op may predate paper).

tropical_matmul.notes: Tropical matmul mixing; novel as architecture.

stdp_attention.notes: STDP-decay attention; simpler than the 2025 STDP transformer.

matmul.notes: Raw learned bilinear token mixing; closest to un-normalized linear attention.

_recursion.notes: Adaptive-depth routing stack, no sequence mixer.

_conditional_compute.notes: Token-entropy/class conditional compute, no sequence mixer.

_ternary_dense.notes: Ternary-quantized dense stack, no sequence mixer.

_dense_ffn.notes: Real structure with NO sequence-mixing op (~1.2K graphs). Mostly from FFN-centric templates (sparse_ffn, residual_block). Degenerate for sequence modeling.

_reaped_no_structure.notes: Graph structure was reaped/compacted from runs.db (graph_json={}); these were real compiled+trained models. Recover structure from program_results history if needed — NOT dense-FFN.

token_merge.notes: Adjacent/similar token merging as the cross-position operation.

gather_topk.notes: Top-k retrieval as the cross-token mixing operation.
